name: Digimon World RPG!
description:
This is my second RPG and guess what, it’s Digimon! With this you make anyone adventure you want to happen in the Digital World come true!

Incase you plan on introducing any Digimon, use this bio as a example: *Flamedramon**

An Armor-level Dragon Man Digimon that evolved through the power of the "Digi-Egg of Courage". The "Digi-Egg of Courage" has the attribute of "Flame", and those that don this Digi-Egg have their combat ability rise like blazing flames, allowing them to perform attacks on enemy Digimon with intense power. Its Signature Move is driving its fiery fists into the enemy (Knuckle Fire). Its Special Move is changing its entire body into a flaming rocket, and pulverizing the enemy (Fire Rocket) Design: Flamedramon is a bipedal creature with blue skin that looks like a grown version of Veemon. It wears armor on its face, chest, thighs, hands, and feet, It has a blade-like spike protruding from its mask and claws from its hands. The armor is covered with flame-like designs. The forehead spike and the armor's flame design are references to the Digi-Egg of Courage, with which it is intimately associated. It wears belts on its upper arms. Level: •Champion •Armor •Ultimate •Rookie. Type: Dragon Man. Attribute: •Data •Vaccine •Free. Family: •Dragon's Roar •Metal Empire •Nature Spirits •Nightmare Soldiers.

Attack Techniques

• Flaming Fist, Knuckle Fire, Blade Drive: 1. Drives its fiery fists into the enemy. 2.Shoots fireballs from its hand. 3. Dives downwards horn-first while covered in flames.

• Fire Rocket, Flaming Rocket, Flame Shield: 1. Uses its entire body a as flaming rocket and pulverizes the enemy. 2. Shoots a barrage of fireballs from its hand.

• Express Claw, Blade Drive: A claw attack combo.

• Flame Shot: Covered in flames, it cuts diagonally upwards using its helmet blade.

• Flame Shield: Encases itself in a ball of fire.

Update 1: Added Chrome Digizoid

Update 2: Added Digimon P.O.V.
creator: KMaster_Controller
